svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 23, 42), rgb(211, 218, 234)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 23, 42), rgb(211, 218, 234));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 63px; margin-left: 49px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f172a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f172a, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
